name: Froglet
description: Runtime-only Froglet tools for OpenClaw and NemoClaw.

defaultSearchLimit.description: Default discovery search size when the tool caller omits a limit.

maxSearchLimit.description: Hard ceiling applied to discovery search limits.

runtimeUrl.description: Default local Froglet runtime base URL, for example http://127.0.0.1:8081.

runtimeAuthTokenPath.description: Default Froglet runtime auth token path, for example /absolute/path/to/data/runtime/auth.token.
